By identifying these fundamental challenges, VTC-Bench establishes a rigorous baseline to guide the development of more generalized visual agentic models.

</details>


### [561] [Prompt Readiness Levels (PRL): a maturity scale and scoring framework for production grade prompt assets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15044)
*Sebastien Guinard*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了Prompt Readiness Levels (PRL)九级成熟度量表和Prompt Readiness Score (PRS)多维评分方法，为提示工程提供结构化治理框架


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前组织缺乏共享、可审计的方法来评估提示资产是否符合运营目标、安全约束和合规要求，需要系统化的治理框架

Method: 引入PRL（受TRL启发的九级成熟度量表）和PRS（具有门限阈值的多维评分方法），设计用于防止弱链接故障模式

Result: PRL/PRS提供了原创的结构化方法论框架，用于管理提示资产的规范、测试、可追溯性、安全评估和部署准备

Conclusion: 该框架使团队和行业能够通过可复现的资格决策来评估提示工程的价值，实现提示资产的系统化治理

Abstract: Prompt engineering has become a production critical component of generative AI systems. However, organizations still lack a shared, auditable method to qualify prompt assets against operational objectives, safety constraints, and compliance requirements. This paper introduces Prompt Readiness Levels (PRL), a nine level maturity scale inspired by TRL, and the Prompt Readiness Score (PRS), a multidimensional scoring method with gating thresholds designed to prevent weak link failure modes. PRL/PRS provide an original, structured and methodological framework for governing prompt assets specification, testing, traceability, security evaluation, and deployment readiness enabling valuation of prompt engineering through reproducible qualification decisions across teams and industries.

</details>


### [562] [Interference-Aware K-Step Reachable Communication in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15054)
*Ziyu Cheng,Jinsheng Ren,Zhouxian Jiang,Chenzhihang Li,Rongye Shi,Bin Liang,Jun Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: IA-KRC是一个多智能体强化学习通信框架，通过K步可达性协议和干扰预测模块，在有限带宽和动态拓扑环境中优化通信伙伴选择，提升协作效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体强化学习中，有限通信带宽和复杂动态环境拓扑给识别高价值通信伙伴带来挑战。智能体需要在不确定性下选择协作伙伴，缺乏关于哪些伙伴能提供任务关键信息的先验知识。

Method: 提出IA-KRC框架，包含两个核心组件：1) K步可达性协议，将消息传递限制在物理可达的邻居范围内；2) 干扰预测模块，通过最小化干扰同时最大化效用来优化伙伴选择。

Result: 与现有方法相比，IA-KRC在环境干扰下实现了更持久和高效的协作。综合评估证实IA-KRC在复杂拓扑和高度动态的多智能体场景中，相比最先进基线方法获得了更优性能，同时展现出更强的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: IA-KRC通过结合可达性约束和干扰预测，有效解决了多智能体通信中的伙伴选择问题，在动态复杂环境中显著提升了协作效率和系统性能。

Abstract: Effective communication is pivotal for addressing complex collaborative tasks in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). Yet, limited communication bandwidth and dynamic, intricate environmental topologies present significant challenges in identifying high-value communication partners. Agents must consequently select collaborators under uncertainty, lacking a priori knowledge of which partners can deliver task-critical information. To this end, we propose Interference-Aware K-Step Reachable Communication (IA-KRC), a novel framework that enhances cooperation via two core components: (1) a K-Step reachability protocol that confines message passing to physically accessible neighbors, and (2) an interference-prediction module that optimizes partner choice by minimizing interference while maximizing utility. Compared to existing methods, IA-KRC enables substantially more persistent and efficient cooperation despite environmental interference. Comprehensive evaluations confirm that IA-KRC achieves superior performance compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while demonstrating enhanced robustness and scalability in complex topological and highly dynamic multi-agent scenarios.

</details>


### [563] [PrototypeNAS: Rapid Design of Deep Neural Networks for Microcontroller Units](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15106)
*Mark Deutel,Simon Geis,Axel Plinge*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PrototypeNAS：一种零样本神经架构搜索方法，能在几分钟内为不同微控制器找到高效的小型DNN模型，无需训练即可实现与大型模型相当的精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备上的DNN推理需要针对不同硬件约束专门设计架构，传统NAS方法需要大量训练且不考虑资源约束，手动设计工作量巨大。

Method: 提出三步搜索方法：1）新颖的搜索空间，结合多种架构类型的结构优化以及剪枝和量化配置优化；2）使用零样本代理集成而非单一代理；3）使用超体积子集选择从帕累托前沿提取最有意义的精度与FLOPs权衡的DNN架构。

Result: 在12个数据集上的图像分类、时间序列分类和目标检测任务中，PrototypeNAS能在几分钟内找到足够小、可部署在现成MCU上的DNN模型，同时达到与大型模型相当的精度。

Conclusion: PrototypeNAS成功解决了传统NAS方法的资源密集和时间消耗问题，实现了DNN设计、专门化与训练的分离，为边缘设备高效DNN推理提供了自动化解决方案。

Abstract: Enabling efficient deep neural network (DNN) inference on edge devices with different hardware constraints is a challenging task that typically requires DNN architectures to be specialized for each device separately. To avoid the huge manual effort, one can use neural architecture search (NAS). However, many existing NAS methods are resource-intensive and time-consuming because they require the training of many different DNNs from scratch. Furthermore, they do not take the resource constraints of the target system into account. To address these shortcomings, we propose PrototypeNAS, a zero-shot NAS method to accelerate and automate the selection, compression, and specialization of DNNs to different target microcontroller units (MCUs). We propose a novel three-step search method that decouples DNN design and specialization from DNN training for a given target platform. First, we present a novel search space that not only cuts out smaller DNNs from a single large architecture, but instead combines the structural optimization of multiple architecture types, as well as optimization of their pruning and quantization configurations. Second, we explore the use of an ensemble of zero-shot proxies during optimization instead of a single one. Third, we propose the use of Hypervolume subset selection to distill DNN architectures from the Pareto front of the multi-objective optimization that represent the most meaningful tradeoffs between accuracy and FLOPs. We evaluate the effectiveness of PrototypeNAS on 12 different datasets in three different tasks: image classification, time series classification, and object detection. Our results demonstrate that PrototypeNAS is able to identify DNN models within minutes that are small enough to be deployed on off-the-shelf MCUs and still achieve accuracies comparable to the performance of large DNN models.

</details>


### [564] [Modeling Matches as Language: A Generative Transformer Approach for Counterfactual Player Valuation in Football](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15212)
*Miru Hong,Minho Lee,Geonhee Jo,Hyeokje Jo,Pascal Bauer,Sang-Ki Ko*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ScoutGPT是一个基于Transformer的生成模型，将足球比赛事件视为序列标记，通过语言建模框架学习比赛动态，能够模拟假设阵容下的事件序列并进行反事实推理，用于评估球员转会影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 足球球员转会评估具有挑战性，因为球员表现高度依赖于战术体系、队友和比赛情境。现有方法主要依赖静态统计数据和主观专家判断，无法充分考虑这些情境因素，缺乏能够预测假设场景结果的反事实模拟机制。

Method: 提出ScoutGPT生成模型，将足球比赛事件视为序列标记，采用基于NanoGPT的Transformer架构进行下一标记预测训练，学习比赛事件序列的动态特性。模型能够模拟假设阵容下的事件序列，并利用蒙特卡洛采样进行反事实模拟，评估未观察到的场景。

Result: 在K联赛数据上的实验表明，模拟的球员转会导致进攻推进和进球概率的可测量变化，证明ScoutGPT能够捕捉超越传统静态指标的球员特定影响，预测性能优于现有基线模型。

Conclusion: ScoutGPT通过将比赛事件序列建模为语言模型，为足球球员转会评估提供了有效的反事实模拟框架，能够更准确地评估球员在特定情境下的潜在影响，超越了传统静态统计方法的局限性。

Abstract: Evaluating football player transfers is challenging because player actions depend strongly on tactical systems, teammates, and match context. Despite this complexity, recruitment decisions often rely on static statistics and subjective expert judgment, which do not fully account for these contextual factors. This limitation stems largely from the absence of counterfactual simulation mechanisms capable of predicting outcomes in hypothetical scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose ScoutGPT, a generative model that treats football match events as sequential tokens within a language modeling framework. Utilizing a NanoGPT-based Transformer architecture trained on next-token prediction, ScoutGPT learns the dynamics of match event sequences to simulate event sequences under hypothetical lineups, demonstrating superior predictive performance compared to existing baseline models. Leveraging this capability, the model employs Monte Carlo sampling to enable counterfactual simulation, allowing for the assessment of unobserved scenarios. Experiments on K League data show that simulated player transfers lead to measurable changes in offensive progression and goal probabilities, indicating that ScoutGPT captures player-specific impact beyond traditional static metrics.

</details>


### [565] [InterPol: De-anonymizing LM Arena via Interpolated Preference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15220)
*Minsung Cho,Jaehyung Kim*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: INTERPOL：一种通过模型插值和自适应课程学习来识别匿名模型响应的框架，显著优于现有基线方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 投票式排行榜（如LM Arena）的可靠性依赖于模型的严格匿名性。现有方法使用TF-IDF等简单统计特征缺乏区分能力，难以区分风格相似或同家族模型，需要更强大的识别方法来暴露系统漏洞

Method: INTERPOL框架：1）通过模型插值合成困难负样本；2）采用自适应课程学习策略；3）学习深层风格模式而非表面统计特征；4）使用插值偏好数据进行目标模型识别

Result: INTERPOL在识别准确率上显著优于现有基线方法。通过在Arena对战数据上进行排名操纵模拟，量化了现实世界中的威胁程度

Conclusion: INTERPOL框架有效暴露了匿名投票系统的严重漏洞，表明现有简单统计特征方法不足以保证模型匿名性，需要更强的防御机制

Abstract: Strict anonymity of model responses is a key for the reliability of voting-based leaderboards, such as LM Arena. While prior studies have attempted to compromise this assumption using simple statistical features like TF-IDF or bag-ofwords, these methods often lack the discriminative power to distinguish between stylistically similar or within-family models. To overcome these limitations and expose the severity of vulnerability, we introduce INTERPOL, a model-driven identification framework that learns to distinguish target models from others using interpolated preference data. Specifically, INTERPOL captures deep stylistic patterns that superficial statistical features miss by synthesizing hard negative samples through model interpolation and employing an adaptive curriculum learning strategy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INTERPOL significantly outperforms existing baselines in identification accuracy. Furthermore, we quantify the real-world threat of our findings through ranking manipulation simulations on Arena battle data.

</details>


### [566] [SCAN: Sparse Circuit Anchor Interpretable Neuron for Lifelong Knowledge Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15226)
*Yuhuan Liu,Haitian Zhong,Xinyuan Xia,Qiang Liu,Shu Wu,Liang Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SCAN是一个基于稀疏电路锚定神经元的稀疏编辑框架，通过构建知识电路来解决LLMs顺序知识编辑中的灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在顺序知识编辑时经常遭受灾难性遗忘和模型崩溃。现有密集编辑范式将模型视为黑盒，依赖粗粒度参数干预，不可避免地破坏已保存知识。

Method: 提出SCAN稀疏编辑框架，通过稀疏转码器构建知识电路，将编辑转化为机制感知的操作。该方法在Gemma2、Qwen3和Llama3.1模型上进行实验。

Result: 在CounterFact、ZsRE和WikiFactDiff数据集上，SCAN表现出优越性能，即使在3000次顺序编辑后仍能在MMLU和GSM8K基准上保持模型完整性，而现有方法随编辑累积逐渐恶化最终导致模型崩溃。

Conclusion: SCAN通过稀疏电路锚定神经元的方法有效解决了LLMs顺序知识编辑中的灾难性遗忘问题，保持了模型完整性，优于现有密集编辑方法。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) often suffer from catastrophic forgetting and collapse during sequential knowledge editing. This vulnerability stems from the prevailing dense editing paradigm, which treats models as black boxes and relies on coarse-grained parameter interventions that inevitably disrupt preserved knowledge. To address this, we propose SCAN (a sparse editing framework based on Sparse Circuit Anchored Neuron) which transforms editing into a mechanism-aware manipulation by constructing a knowledge circuit via Sparse Transcoders. Experiments on Gemma2, Qwen3, and Llama3.1 across CounterFact, ZsRE and WikiFactDiff demonstrate that SCAN achieves a superior performance, maintaining model integrity on benchmarks like MMLU and GSM8K even after 3,000 sequential edits, whereas other existing methods deteriorate progressively as editing accumulates, eventually resulting in model collapse.

</details>


### [567] [Why the Valuable Capabilities of LLMs Are Precisely the Unexplainable Ones](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15238)
*Quan Cheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出反直觉论点：大语言模型真正有价值的能力恰恰在于无法被人可读的离散规则完全捕捉的部分。通过专家系统等价性进行反证：如果LLM的全部能力能被完整规则描述，则等价于专家系统，但专家系统历史证明弱于LLM，因此矛盾。LLM超越专家系统的能力正是无法规则编码的部分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战当前对LLM能力的理解，指出传统规则化解释的局限性。通过哲学和历史视角，探讨AI能力的本质，为可解释性研究、AI安全和科学认识论提供新视角。

Method: 采用反证法：1) 假设LLM能力可被完整规则描述；2) 该规则集等价于专家系统；3) 但专家系统历史证明弱于LLM；4) 得出矛盾，证明LLM的核心能力无法规则化。辅以中国哲学"悟"的概念、专家系统历史失败案例和人类认知工具与复杂系统结构不匹配的论证。

Result: 论证成功表明：LLM超越专家系统的能力本质上是非规则化的、涌现的，无法被人类可读的离散规则完全描述。这种能力更接近"悟"的顿悟式认知，而非逻辑推理。

Conclusion: LLM的真正价值在于其无法规则化的能力部分，这对可解释性研究提出挑战：追求完全规则化解释可能徒劳。AI安全需要考虑这种非规则化能力的特性，科学认识论需要重新思考复杂系统的理解方式。

Abstract: This paper proposes and argues for a counterintuitive thesis: the truly valuable capabilities of large language models (LLMs) reside precisely in the part that cannot be fully captured by human-readable discrete rules. The core argument is a proof by contradiction via expert system equivalence: if the full capabilities of an LLM could be described by a complete set of human-readable rules, then that rule set would be functionally equivalent to an expert system; but expert systems have been historically and empirically demonstrated to be strictly weaker than LLMs; therefore, a contradiction arises -- the capabilities of LLMs that exceed those of expert systems are exactly the capabilities that cannot be rule-encoded. This thesis is further supported by the Chinese philosophical concept of Wu (sudden insight through practice), the historical failure of expert systems, and a structural mismatch between human cognitive tools and complex systems. The paper discusses implications for interpretability research, AI safety, and scientific epistemology.

</details>


### [568] [SAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15255)
*Yulin Peng,Xinxin Zhu,Chenxing Wei,Nianbo Zeng,Leilei Wang,Ying Tiffany He,F. Richard Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SAGE是一个自演化的多智能体框架，通过四个协同进化的智能体（挑战者、规划者、求解者、批评者）实现闭环推理训练，仅需少量种子数据即可稳定提升LLM的数学和代码生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法依赖大量人工标注数据，而自对弈方法缺乏显式规划和质量控制，导致长时域多步推理不稳定。需要一种既能减少人工依赖又能保证训练稳定性的方法。

Method: 提出SAGE框架：四个智能体共享LLM主干，挑战者生成渐进困难任务，规划者转换为结构化多步计划，求解者执行计划生成答案，批评者评分过滤问题和计划以防止课程漂移。仅需少量种子集即可实现稳定自训练。

Result: 在数学和代码生成基准测试中，SAGE在不同模型规模上均取得一致提升，将Qwen-2.5-7B模型在LiveCodeBench上提升8.9%，在OlympiadBench上提升10.7%。

Conclusion: SAGE通过多智能体协同进化的闭环框架，仅需少量种子数据即可实现稳定自训练，有效提升LLM在复杂推理任务上的性能，为减少人工标注依赖提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards improves reasoning in large language models (LLMs), but many methods still rely on large human-labeled datasets. While self-play reduces this dependency, it often lacks explicit planning and strong quality control, limiting stability in long-horizon multi-step reasoning. We present SAGE (Self-evolving Agents for Generalized reasoning Evolution), a closed-loop framework where four agents: Challenger, Planner, Solver, and Critic, co-evolve from a shared LLM backbone using only a small seed set. The Challenger continuously generates increasingly difficult tasks; the Planner converts each task into a structured multi-step plan; and the Solver follows the plan to produce an answer, whose correctness is determined by external verifiers. The Critic scores and filters both generated questions and plans to prevent curriculum drift and maintain training signal quality, enabling stable self-training. Across mathematics and code-generation benchmarks, SAGE delivers consistent gains across model scales, improving the Qwen-2.5-7B model by 8.9% on LiveCodeBench and 10.7% on OlympiadBench.

</details>


### [569] [AGCD: Agent-Guided Cross-Modal Decoding for Weather Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15260)
*Jing Wu,Yang Liu,Lin Zhang,Junbo Zeng,Jiabin Wang,Zi Ye,Guowen Li,Shilei Cao,Jiashun Cheng,Fang Wang,Meng Jin,Yerong Feng,Hong Cheng,Yutong Lu,Haohuan Fu,Juepeng Zheng*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出AGCD方法，通过多智能体气象叙事生成状态条件物理先验，在解码时注入到天气预报模型中，提升长期预测的物理一致性和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有物理先验方法通常通过架构、正则化或数值天气预报耦合施加全局约束，在部署时缺乏状态自适应和样本特定的可控性。天气预报不仅是网格回归，还需要保持连贯的天气系统结构和物理一致性，特别是在自回归推演中，小的一步误差可能放大为结构性偏差。

Method: 提出Agent-Guided Cross-modal Decoding (AGCD)：1) 多智能体气象叙事管道，利用MLLMs提取各种气象要素，生成状态条件物理先验；2) 跨模态区域交互解码，执行区域感知多尺度标记化和高效物理先验注入，在不改变骨干网络接口的情况下细化视觉特征。

Result: 在WeatherBench上的实验显示，在两种分辨率（5.625度和1.40625度）和多种骨干网络（通用和天气专用）上，6小时预报均获得一致提升。包括严格的因果48小时自回归推演，减少了早期误差累积并提高了长期稳定性。

Conclusion: AGCD提供了一种即插即用的解码时先验注入范式，能够以可控和可重用的方式将状态条件物理先验注入到天气预报器中，有效提升预测的物理一致性和长期稳定性。

Abstract: Accurate weather forecasting is more than grid-wise regression: it must preserve coherent synoptic structures and physical consistency of meteorological fields, especially under autoregressive rollouts where small one-step errors can amplify into structural bias. Existing physics-priors approaches typically impose global, once-for-all constraints via architectures, regularization, or NWP coupling, offering limited state-adaptive and sample-specific controllability at deployment. To bridge this gap, we propose Agent-Guided Cross-modal Decoding (AGCD), a plug-and-play decoding-time prior-injection paradigm that derives state-conditioned physics-priors from the current multivariate atmosphere and injects them into forecasters in a controllable and reusable way. Specifically, We design a multi-agent meteorological narration pipeline to generate state-conditioned physics-priors, utilizing MLLMs to extract various meteorological elements effectively. To effectively apply the priors, AGCD further introduce cross-modal region interaction decoding that performs region-aware multi-scale tokenization and efficient physics-priors injection to refine visual features without changing the backbone interface. Experiments on WeatherBench demonstrate consistent gains for 6-hour forecasting across two resolutions (5.625 degree and 1.40625 degree) and diverse backbones (generic and weather-specialized), including strictly causal 48-hour autoregressive rollouts that reduce early-stage error accumulation and improve long-horizon stability.

</details>


### [570] [Probe-then-Plan: Environment-Aware Planning for Industrial E-commerce Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15262)
*Mengxiang Chen,Zhouwei Zhai,Jin Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: EASP通过"探测-规划"机制解决电商搜索中的盲区-延迟困境，在检索快照基础上进行动态推理，显著提升召回率和转化率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM搜索方案面临根本性困境：查询重写不了解检索能力和实时库存，产生无效计划；而深度搜索代理依赖迭代工具调用和反思，延迟过高不符合工业级亚秒预算

Method: 提出环境感知搜索规划(EASP)，采用"探测-规划"机制：轻量级检索探针暴露检索快照，规划器诊断执行差距并生成接地气的搜索计划。包含三个阶段：离线数据合成、规划器训练与对齐、自适应在线服务

Result: 在JD.com的离线评估和在线A/B测试中，EASP显著提升相关召回率，并在UCVR和GMV上取得实质性提升，已成功部署到JD.com的AI-Search系统

Conclusion: EASP通过将搜索规划重新定义为基于环境现实的动态推理过程，成功解决了LLM搜索中的盲区-延迟困境，实现了工业级可部署的高效搜索规划

Abstract: Modern e-commerce search is evolving to resolve complex user intents. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer strong reasoning, existing LLM-based paradigms face a fundamental blindness-latency dilemma: query rewriting is agnostic to retrieval capabilities and real-time inventory, yielding invalid plans; conversely, deep search agents rely on iterative tool calls and reflection, incurring seconds of latency incompatible with industrial sub-second budgets. To resolve this conflict, we propose Environment-Aware Search Planning (EASP), reformulating search planning as a dynamic reasoning process grounded in environmental reality. EASP introduces a Probe-then-Plan mechanism: a lightweight Retrieval Probe exposes the retrieval snapshot, enabling the Planner to diagnose execution gaps and generate grounded search plans. The methodology comprises three stages: (1) Offline Data Synthesis: A Teacher Agent synthesizes diverse, execution-validated plans by diagnosing the probed environment. (2) Planner Training and Alignment: The Planner is initialized via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to internalize diagnostic capabilities, then aligned with business outcomes (conversion rate) via Reinforcement Learning (RL). (3) Adaptive Online Serving: A complexity-aware routing mechanism selectively activates planning for complex queries, ensuring optimal resource allocation. Extensive offline evaluations and online A/B testing on JD.com demonstrate that EASP significantly improves relevant recall and achieves substantial lifts in UCVR and GMV. EASP has been successfully deployed in JD.com's AI-Search system.

</details>


### [571] [Advancing Multimodal Agent Reasoning with Long-Term Neuro-Symbolic Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15280)
*Rongjie Jiang,Jianwei Wang,Gengda Zhao,Chengyang Luo,Kai Wang,Wenjie Zhang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: NS-Mem是一个神经符号记忆框架，通过整合神经记忆与显式符号结构和规则，提升多模态智能体的长期推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于神经表示和向量检索的多模态智能体记忆系统主要支持直觉性推理，但缺乏对现实世界决策至关重要的分析性、演绎性推理能力。

Method: 提出NS-Mem框架，包含三层记忆架构（情景层、语义层、逻辑规则层）、SK-Gen实现的记忆构建与维护机制，以及结合相似性搜索与确定性符号查询的混合检索机制。

Result: 在真实世界多模态推理基准测试中，NS-Mem相比纯神经记忆系统平均推理准确率提升4.35%，在约束推理查询上最高提升12.5%。

Conclusion: 神经符号记忆框架NS-Mem通过整合神经和符号表示，有效提升了多模态智能体的长期推理能力，特别是在需要分析性、演绎性推理的任务上。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models have driven the emergence of intelligent agents operating in open-world, multimodal environments. To support long-term reasoning, such agents are typically equipped with external memory systems. However, most existing multimodal agent memories rely primarily on neural representations and vector-based retrieval, which are well-suited for inductive, intuitive reasoning but fundamentally limited in supporting analytical, deductive reasoning critical for real-world decision making. To address this limitation, we propose NS-Mem, a long-term neuro-symbolic memory framework designed to advance multimodal agent reasoning by integrating neural memory with explicit symbolic structures and rules. Specifically, NS-Mem is operated around three core components of a memory system: (1) a three-layer memory architecture that consists episodic layer, semantic layer and logic rule layer, (2) a memory construction and maintenance mechanism implemented by SK-Gen that automatically consolidates structured knowledge from accumulated multimodal experiences and incrementally updates both neural representations and symbolic rules, and (3) a hybrid memory retrieval mechanism that combines similarity-based search with deterministic symbolic query functions to support structured reasoning. Experiments on real-world multimodal reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Neural-Symbolic Memory achieves an average 4.35% improvement in overall reasoning accuracy over pure neural memory systems, with gains of up to 12.5% on constrained reasoning queries, validating the effectiveness of NS-Mem.

</details>


### [572] [Algorithms for Deciding the Safety of States in Fully Observable Non-deterministic Problems: Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15282)
*Johannes Schmalz,Chaahat Jain*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出iPI算法，结合TarjanSafe的最佳情况性能和线性时间算法的多项式最坏情况保证，解决学习策略安全性验证的效率问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 学习到的动作策略在顺序决策中越来越流行，但缺乏安全保证。现有最有效的安全验证算法TarjanSafe在基准测试中表现良好，但存在指数级最坏情况时间复杂度，而线性时间替代方案在实际中较慢。

Method: 提出新的策略迭代算法iPI，结合了TarjanSafe的最佳情况运行时间和多项式最坏情况保证。该算法在适合TarjanSafe的问题中保持相似性能，在不适合的问题中指数级扩展更好。

Result: 实验证实理论分析，在适合TarjanSafe的问题中iPI具有相似性能，在不适合的问题中iPI的扩展性指数级更好。

Conclusion: iPI算法填补了现有安全验证算法的性能差距，既保持了TarjanSafe的最佳情况性能，又保证了多项式最坏情况时间复杂度，为学习策略的安全性验证提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Learned action policies are increasingly popular in sequential decision-making, but suffer from a lack of safety guarantees. Recent work introduced a pipeline for testing the safety of such policies under initial-state and action-outcome non-determinism. At the pipeline's core, is the problem of deciding whether a state is safe (a safe policy exists from the state) and finding faults, which are state-action pairs that transition from a safe state to an unsafe one. Their most effective algorithm for deciding safety, TarjanSafe, is effective on their benchmarks, but we show that it has exponential worst-case runtime with respect to the state space. A linear-time alternative exists, but it is slower in practice. We close this gap with a new policy-iteration algorithm iPI, that combines the best of both: it matches TarjanSafe's best-case runtime while guaranteeing a polynomial worst-case. Experiments confirm our theory and show that in problems amenable to TarjanSafe iPI has similar performance, whereas in ill-suited problems iPI scales exponentially better.

</details>


### [573] [Evolutionary Transfer Learning for Dragonchess](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15297)
*Jim O'Connor,Annika Hoag,Sarah Goyette,Gary B. Parker*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文将Dragonchess作为AI研究新测试平台，研究如何从Stockfish迁移启发式函数，并通过CMA-ES进化优化，证明进化方法能有效适应复杂游戏领域。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Dragonchess作为三维象棋变体具有独特的战略和计算挑战，是研究AI启发式跨领域迁移的理想环境。需要为社区提供开源游戏引擎，并探索如何将现有AI知识适应到结构复杂的新游戏领域。

Method: 1) 开发Python开源Dragonchess游戏引擎；2) 从Stockfish直接迁移启发式评估函数；3) 使用协方差矩阵自适应进化策略(CMA-ES)优化这些函数；4) 通过50轮瑞士式锦标赛进行实证评估。

Result: 直接启发式迁移因Dragonchess的多层结构和移动规则差异而效果不佳，但进化优化显著提升了AI代理性能，在锦标赛中表现出优越的游戏能力。

Conclusion: 进化方法能有效将启发式知识适应到结构复杂、先前未探索的游戏领域，为AI跨领域知识迁移提供了有效途径。

Abstract: Dragonchess, a three-dimensional chess variant introduced by Gary Gygax, presents unique strategic and computational challenges that make it an ideal environment for studying the transfer of artificial intelligence (AI) heuristics across domains. In this work, we introduce Dragonchess as a novel testbed for AI research and provide an open-source, Python-based game engine for community use. Our research investigates evolutionary transfer learning by adapting heuristic evaluation functions directly from Stockfish, a leading chess engine, and subsequently optimizing them using Covariance Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES). Initial trials showed that direct heuristic transfers were inadequate due to Dragonchess's distinct multi-layer structure and movement rules. However, evolutionary optimization significantly improved AI agent performance, resulting in superior gameplay demonstrated through empirical evaluation in a 50-round Swiss-style tournament. This research establishes the effectiveness of evolutionary methods in adapting heuristic knowledge to structurally complex, previously unexplored game domains.

</details>


### [574] [Intelligent Co-Design: An Interactive LLM Framework for Interior Spatial Design via Multi-Modal Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15341)
*Ren Jian Lim,Rushi Dai*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一個基於大型語言模型的多模態多代理框架，將自然語言描述和圖像動態轉換為3D室內設計，改善設計師與客戶間的溝通問題。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建築室內設計中，客戶缺乏設計知識而設計師難以解釋複雜空間關係，導致溝通不暢、時間延誤和財務損失。現有生成式布局工具存在限制：基於規則的系統使用硬編碼空間約束限制參與，而數據驅動模型需要大量訓練數據。

Method: 提出LLM-based多模態多代理框架，包含專門代理（參考、空間、互動、評分），透過提示指南協作。系統支持實時用戶互動進行迭代空間優化，並使用檢索增強生成（RAG）減少數據依賴，無需任務特定模型訓練。

Result: 評估顯示框架能準確解讀空間意圖並生成優化3D室內設計。獨立LLM評估器評定參與式布局在用戶意圖對齊、美學連貫性、功能性和流通性方面表現更好。問卷結果顯示77%滿意度，明顯優於傳統設計軟體。

Conclusion: 該框架增強了以用戶為中心的溝通，促進更包容、有效和韌性的設計過程，改善設計師與非設計師之間的協作。

Abstract: In architectural interior design, miscommunication frequently arises as clients lack design knowledge, while designers struggle to explain complex spatial relationships, leading to delayed timelines and financial losses. Recent advancements in generative layout tools narrow the gap by automating 3D visualizations. However, prevailing methodologies exhibit limitations: rule-based systems implement hard-coded spatial constraints that restrict participatory engagement, while data-driven models rely on extensive training datasets. Recent large language models (LLMs) bridge this gap by enabling intuitive reasoning about spatial relationships through natural language. This research presents an LLM-based, multimodal, multi-agent framework that dynamically converts natural language descriptions and imagery into 3D designs. Specialized agents (Reference, Spatial, Interactive, Grader), operating via prompt guidelines, collaboratively address core challenges: the agent system enables real-time user interaction for iterative spatial refinement, while Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reduces data dependency without requiring task-specific model training. This framework accurately interprets spatial intent and generates optimized 3D indoor design, improving productivity, and encouraging nondesigner participation. Evaluations across diverse floor plans and user questionnaires demonstrate effectiveness. An independent LLM evaluator consistently rated participatory layouts higher in user intent alignment, aesthetic coherence, functionality, and circulation. Questionnaire results indicated 77% satisfaction and a clear preference over traditional design software. These findings suggest the framework enhances user-centric communication and fosters more inclusive, effective, and resilient design processes. Project page: https://rsigktyper.github.io/AICodesign/

</details>


### [575] [PMAx: An Agentic Framework for AI-Driven Process Mining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15351)
*Anton Antonov,Humam Kourani,Alessandro Berti,Gyunam Park,Wil M. P. van der Aalst*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PMAx是一个基于多智能体的隐私保护框架，将计算与解释分离，让非技术用户通过自然语言获得可靠的过程挖掘洞察，同时确保数学准确性和数据隐私。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统过程挖掘需要专业知识，而直接使用LLM存在确定性推理困难和数据隐私问题。需要让业务用户通过自然语言访问过程数据，同时解决LLM的幻觉问题和隐私风险。

Method: 采用隐私保护的多智能体架构：工程师智能体分析事件日志元数据，自动生成本地脚本运行成熟的过程挖掘算法；分析师智能体解释结果并生成报告。计算与解释分离，分析在本地执行。

Result: PMAx能够将高层次业务问题转化为可靠的过程洞察，确保数学准确性，保护数据隐私，使非技术用户能够通过自然语言交互获得过程挖掘分析。

Conclusion: PMAx通过分离计算与解释的智能体架构，解决了LLM在过程挖掘中的幻觉和隐私问题，实现了过程挖掘的民主化，让业务用户能够安全可靠地访问过程洞察。

Abstract: Process mining provides powerful insights into organizational workflows, but extracting these insights typically requires expertise in specialized query languages and data science tools. Large Language Models (LLMs) offer the potential to democratize process mining by enabling business users to interact with process data through natural language. However, using LLMs as direct analytical engines over raw event logs introduces fundamental challenges: LLMs struggle with deterministic reasoning and may hallucinate metrics, while sending large, sensitive logs to external AI services raises serious data-privacy concerns. To address these limitations, we present PMAx, an autonomous agentic framework that functions as a virtual process analyst. Rather than relying on LLMs to generate process models or compute analytical results, PMAx employs a privacy-preserving multi-agent architecture. An Engineer agent analyzes event-log metadata and autonomously generates local scripts to run established process mining algorithms, compute exact metrics, and produce artifacts such as process models, summary tables, and visualizations. An Analyst agent then interprets these insights and artifacts to compile comprehensive reports. By separating computation from interpretation and executing analysis locally, PMAx ensures mathematical accuracy and data privacy while enabling non-technical users to transform high-level business questions into reliable process insights.

</details>


### [576] [CRASH: Cognitive Reasoning Agent for Safety Hazards in Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15364)
*Erick Silva,Rehana Yasmin,Ali Shoker*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 开发了基于LLM的CRASH系统来自动分析NHTSA自动驾驶事故报告，发现64%事故源于感知或规划故障，50%为追尾碰撞，专家验证准确率达86%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自动驾驶系统架构日益复杂多样（端到端vs模块化设计），事故调查缺乏标准化方法，难以系统性地分析安全问题和确定根本原因。

Method: 提出CRASH（Cognitive Reasoning Agent for Safety Hazards）系统，基于LLM代理自动处理NHTSA数据库中的2,168起事故报告（2021-2025年，超8000万英里行驶里程），利用标准化字段和非结构化叙述描述进行推理分析。

Result: 1. 64%的事故被归因于感知或规划故障；2. 约50%的事故涉及追尾碰撞；3. 经五位领域专家验证，CRASH在归因自动驾驶系统故障方面达到86%的准确率。

Conclusion: CRASH展示了作为可扩展、可解释的自动事故分析工具的潜力，能为自动驾驶安全研究和系统开发提供可操作的见解。

Abstract: As AVs grow in complexity and diversity, identifying the root causes of operational failures has become increasingly complex. The heterogeneity of system architectures across manufacturers, ranging from end-to-end to modular designs, together with variations in algorithms and integration strategies, limits the standardization of incident investigations and hinders systematic safety analysis. This work examines real-world AV incidents reported in the NHTSA database. We curate a dataset of 2,168 cases reported between 2021 and 2025, representing more than 80 million miles driven. To process this data, we introduce CRASH, Cognitive Reasoning Agent for Safety Hazards, an LLM-based agent that automates reasoning over crash reports by leveraging both standardized fields and unstructured narrative descriptions. CRASH operates on a unified representation of each incident to generate concise summaries, attribute a primary cause, and assess whether the AV materially contributed to the event. Our findings show that (1) CRASH attributes 64% of incidents to perception or planning failures, underscoring the importance of reasoning-based analysis for accurate fault attribution; and (2) approximately 50% of reported incidents involve rear-end collisions, highlighting a persistent and unresolved challenge in autonomous driving deployment. We further validate CRASH with five domain experts, achieving 86% accuracy in attributing AV system failures. Overall, CRASH demonstrates strong potential as a scalable and interpretable tool for automated crash analysis, providing actionable insights to support safety research and the continued development of autonomous driving systems.

</details>


### [577] [Brain-Inspired Graph Multi-Agent Systems for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15371)
*Guangfu Hao,Yuming Dai,Xianzhe Qin,Shan Yu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: BIGMAS：受全球工作空间理论启发的图多智能体系统，通过动态构建的智能体拓扑和集中式共享工作空间，提升LLM在复杂多步推理任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在多种语言任务上表现出色，但复杂多步推理仍是根本挑战。现有大型推理模型虽然通过扩展思维链机制提升了性能，但在足够复杂的任务上仍会出现准确性崩溃，表明仅扩展模型级推理是不够的。受人类认知的全球工作空间理论启发，需要新的架构设计来补充模型级推理增强。

Method: 提出BIGMAS（脑启发图多智能体系统），将专门的LLM智能体组织为动态构建的有向图中的节点，通过集中式共享工作空间进行协调。包含两个关键组件：1）问题自适应的GraphDesigner构建任务特定的智能体拓扑；2）全局Orchestrator利用完整的共享状态进行路由决策，克服反应式方法的局部视图瓶颈。

Result: 在Game24、Six Fives和Tower of London三个任务上，使用六个前沿LLM进行实验，BIGMAS一致提升了标准LLM和LRM的推理性能，超越了包括ReAct和Tree of Thoughts在内的现有多智能体基线方法，表明多智能体架构设计提供了与模型级推理增强正交的互补收益。

Conclusion: BIGMAS通过受脑启发设计的图多智能体系统，有效提升了LLM在复杂推理任务上的性能，证明了多智能体架构设计能够为模型级推理增强提供有价值的补充，为解决复杂多步推理挑战提供了新的方向。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a wide range of language tasks, yet complex multi-step reasoning remains a fundamental challenge. While Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) equipped with extended chain-of-thought mechanisms demonstrate improved performance over standard LLMs, both model types still suffer from accuracy collapse on sufficiently complex tasks, suggesting that scaling model-level reasoning alone is insufficient. Inspired by the global workspace theory of human cognition, we propose Brain-Inspired Graph Multi-Agent Systems (BIGMAS), in which specialized LLM agents are organized as nodes in a dynamically constructed directed graph and coordinate exclusively through a centralized shared workspace. A problem-adaptive GraphDesigner constructs task-specific agent topologies, while a global Orchestrator leverages the complete shared state for routing decisions, overcoming the local-view bottleneck of reactive approaches. Experiments on Game24, Six Fives, and Tower of London across six frontier LLMs demonstrate that BIGMAS consistently improves reasoning performance for both standard LLMs and LRMs, outperforming existing multi-agent baselines including ReAct and Tree of Thoughts, showing that multi-agent architectural design provides complementary gains orthogonal to model-level reasoning enhancements.

</details>


### [578] [Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15381)
*Emmanuel Dupoux,Yann LeCun,Jitendra Malik*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出受生物认知启发的AI学习架构，整合观察学习与行为学习，通过元控制系统灵活切换学习模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI模型在实现自主学习方面存在局限，需要借鉴人类和动物认知机制来构建更灵活的学习系统

Method: 提出三系统架构：系统A（观察学习）、系统B（主动行为学习）、系统M（元控制系统），通过元控制信号灵活切换学习模式，借鉴生物在进化和发展时间尺度上适应动态环境的机制

Result: 提出了一个理论框架，尚未有具体实验结果，但为构建更自主的AI学习系统提供了新的架构思路

Conclusion: 通过整合观察学习、行为学习和元控制机制，可以构建更接近生物认知的AI学习架构，为实现真正的自主学习提供理论方向

Abstract: We critically examine the limitations of current AI models in achieving autonomous learning and propose a learning architecture inspired by human and animal cognition. The proposed framework integrates learning from observation (System A) and learning from active behavior (System B) while flexibly switching between these learning modes as a function of internally generated meta-control signals (System M). We discuss how this could be built by taking inspiration on how organisms adapt to real-world, dynamic environments across evolutionary and developmental timescales.

</details>


### [579] [A Hybrid Modeling Framework for Crop Prediction Tasks via Dynamic Parameter Calibration and Multi-Task Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15411)
*William Solow,Paola Pesantez-Cabrera,Markus Keller,Lav Khot,Sandhya Saisubramanian,Alan Fern*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种混合建模方法，使用神经网络参数化可微分生物物理模型，通过多任务学习在数据有限情况下实现作物品种间的数据共享，提高预测精度并保持生物真实性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确预测作物状态（如物候期和抗寒性）对及时农场管理决策至关重要。传统生物物理模型缺乏站点特异性管理所需的精度，而深度学习方法可能产生生物不现实的预测且需要大规模数据。

Method: 采用混合建模方法：使用神经网络参数化可微分生物物理模型，通过多任务学习在数据有限情况下实现不同作物品种间的数据共享，预测生物物理模型的参数而非直接预测作物状态。

Result: 在真实世界和合成数据集上的实证评估表明，该方法相比已部署的生物物理模型，物候期预测精度提高60%，抗寒性预测精度提高40%。

Conclusion: 提出的混合建模方法在保持生物真实性的同时显著提高了作物状态预测精度，为数据有限情况下的精准农业管理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Accurate prediction of crop states (e.g., phenology stages and cold hardiness) is essential for timely farm management decisions such as irrigation, fertilization, and canopy management to optimize crop yield and quality. While traditional biophysical models can be used for season-long predictions, they lack the precision required for site-specific management. Deep learning methods are a compelling alternative, but can produce biologically unrealistic predictions and require large-scale data. We propose a \emph{hybrid modeling} approach that uses a neural network to parameterize a differentiable biophysical model and leverages multi-task learning for efficient data sharing across crop cultivars in data limited settings. By predicting the \emph{parameters} of the biophysical model, our approach improves the prediction accuracy while preserving biological realism. Empirical evaluation using real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrates that our method improves prediction accuracy by 60\% for phenology and 40\% for cold hardiness compared to deployed biophysical models.

</details>


### [580] [Listening to the Echo: User-Reaction Aware Policy Optimization via Scalar-Verbal Hybrid Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15434)
*Jing Ye,Xinpei Zhao,Lu Xiang,Yaping Zhang,Chengqing Zong*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RAPO框架利用用户实时反应而非稀疏标量奖励来优化情感支持对话系统，通过事后对话选择、生成式事后反馈和标量-语言混合策略优化三个组件提升交互效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前情感支持对话系统依赖专家定义的稀疏标量奖励，无法解释失败原因或适应动态用户状态，偏离了促进积极情绪转变的实际目标。最直接可靠的学习信号来自用户在持续交互中的实时反应。

Method: 提出反应感知策略优化(RAPO)框架，包含三个核心组件：1) 事后对话选择：识别显著改变用户情绪轨迹的关键对话轮次；2) 生成式事后反馈：将用户反应转化为对比排序信号和自然语言批评；3) 标量-语言混合策略优化：结合标量奖励优化实现全局对齐，以及语言反馈蒸馏实现细粒度语义精炼。

Result: 在ESC和Sotopia数据集上的大量实验表明，RAPO在驱动积极交互结果方面显著优于强化学习基线方法。

Conclusion: RAPO通过利用用户反应作为密集学习信号，将对话视为反应驱动的过程，有效解决了传统标量奖励的信息稀疏问题，提升了情感支持对话系统的实际效果。

Abstract: While current emotional support dialogue systems typically rely on expert-defined scalar rewards for alignment, these signals suffer from severe information sparsity. They cannot explain why a response failed or how to adapt to dynamic user states, often diverging from the actual goal of facilitating positive emotional shifts. In practice, the most direct and reliable learning signal emerges from the user's continuous reactions during ongoing interaction. We therefore propose Reaction Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO), a framework that optimizes over interaction consequences rather than rubric scores. RAPO treats dialogue as a reaction-driven process and utilizes simulated user responses to generate dense natural-language feedback through three core components: Hindsight Dialogue Selection, which isolates pivotal turns that meaningfully alter user emotional trajectories; Generative Hindsight Feedback, which transforms user reactions into contrastive ranking signals and natural-language critiques; and Scalar-Verbal Hybrid Policy Optimization, which couples scalar reward optimization for global alignment with verbal feedback distillation for fine-grained semantic refinement. Extensive experiments on ESC and Sotopia demonstrate that RAPO significantly outperforms strong reinforcement learning baselines in driving positive interaction outcomes.

</details>


### [581] [Unlocking the Value of Text: Event-Driven Reasoning and Multi-Level Alignment for Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15452)
*Siyuan Wang,Peng Chen,Yihang Wang,Wanghui Qiu,Chenjuan Guo,Bin Yang,Yang Shu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: VoT是一个利用文本信息进行时间序列预测的新方法，通过事件驱动推理和多层次对齐机制，显著提升了预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测方法主要依赖数值数据，但现实世界的时间序列包含与多模态信息相关的复杂模式，仅靠数值数据难以准确预测。虽然已有一些多模态时间序列预测方法，但它们要么使用信息有限的文本，要么只关注表示提取，未能充分利用文本信息进行预测。

Method: 提出了VoT方法，包含事件驱动推理和多层次对齐两个核心组件。事件驱动推理结合外生文本的丰富信息和LLM的强大推理能力进行预测，并通过历史上下文学习检索和应用历史示例作为上下文指导。多层次对齐包括表示层面的内生文本对齐（将内生文本信息与时间序列整合）和预测层面的自适应频率融合（融合事件驱动预测和数值预测的频率成分）。

Result: 在10个领域的真实世界数据集上的实验表明，该方法相比现有方法有显著改进，验证了在文本利用方面的有效性。

Conclusion: VoT方法通过有效利用文本信息，显著提升了时间序列预测性能，证明了文本在时间序列预测中的价值。

Abstract: Existing time series forecasting methods primarily rely on the numerical data itself. However, real-world time series exhibit complex patterns associated with multimodal information, making them difficult to predict with numerical data alone. While several multimodal time series forecasting methods have emerged, they either utilize text with limited supplementary information or focus merely on representation extraction, extracting minimal textual information for forecasting. To unlock the Value of Text, we propose VoT, a method with Event-driven Reasoning and Multi-level Alignment. Event-driven Reasoning combines the rich information in exogenous text with the powerful reasoning capabilities of LLMs for time series forecasting. To guide the LLMs in effective reasoning, we propose the Historical In-context Learning that retrieves and applies historical examples as in-context guidance. To maximize the utilization of text, we propose Multi-level Alignment. At the representation level, we utilize the Endogenous Text Alignment to integrate the endogenous text information with the time series. At the prediction level, we design the Adaptive Frequency Fusion to fuse the frequency components of event-driven prediction and numerical prediction to achieve complementary advantages. Experiments on real-world datasets across 10 domains demonstrate significant improvements over existing methods, validating the effectiveness of our approach in the utilization of text. The code is made available at https://github.com/decisionintelligence/VoT.

</details>


### [582] [Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK): Reusable Middleware Components for Robust AI Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15473)
*Zidane Wright,Jason Tsay,Anupama Murthi,Osher Elhadad,Diego Del Rio,Saurabh Goyal,Kiran Kate,Jim Laredo,Koren Lazar,Vinod Muthusamy,Yara Rizk*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: ALTK是一个开源模块化中间件工具包，用于系统化处理AI代理在部署中的故障模式，覆盖代理全生命周期，提升生产级代理的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI代理从演示转向企业部署时，故障模式变得至关重要：工具参数误解可能破坏生产数据，静默推理错误可能导致损害，违反组织政策的输出可能带来法律或合规风险。大多数代理框架让开发者临时处理这些故障，导致脆弱、一次性且难以维护的安全措施。

Method: 提出Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK)，一个开源模块化中间件组件集合，在代理全生命周期的关键节点进行干预：用户请求后、LLM提示条件前、LLM输出处理后、工具验证前、工具结果检查后、响应组装前。提供检测、修复和缓解常见故障模式的模块化中间件。

Result: ALTK提供一致的接口，自然融入现有流程，兼容低代码和无代码工具（如ContextForge MCP Gateway和Langflow），显著减少构建可靠生产级代理的工作量。

Conclusion: ALTK通过系统化的中间件方法解决了企业AI代理部署中的关键可靠性问题，为开发者提供了可重用、可维护的故障处理框架，降低了生产级代理的开发难度。

Abstract: As AI agents move from demos into enterprise deployments, their failure modes become consequential: a misinterpreted tool argument can corrupt production data, a silent reasoning error can go undetected until damage is done, and outputs that violate organizational policy can create legal or compliance risk. Yet, most agent frameworks leave builders to handle these failure modes ad hoc, resulting in brittle, one-off safeguards that are hard to reuse or maintain. We present the Agent Lifecycle Toolkit (ALTK), an open-source collection of modular middleware components that systematically address these gaps across the full agent lifecycle.
  Across the agent lifecycle, we identify opportunities to intervene and improve, namely, post-user-request, pre-LLM prompt conditioning, post-LLM output processing, pre-tool validation, post-tool result checking, and pre-response assembly. ALTK provides modular middleware that detects, repairs, and mitigates common failure modes. It offers consistent interfaces that fit naturally into existing pipelines. It is compatible with low-code and no-code tools such as the ContextForge MCP Gateway and Langflow. Finally, it significantly reduces the effort of building reliable, production-grade agents.

</details>


### [583] [Talk, Evaluate, Diagnose: User-aware Agent Evaluation with Automated Error Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15483)
*Penny Chong,Harshavardhan Abichandani,Jiyuan Shen,Atin Ghosh,Min Pyae Moe,Yifan Mai,Daniel Dahlmeier*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: TED框架：通过可复用用户角色模板、自然语言评估指标和自动错误分析，为异构领域智能体提供统一评估方法，关注对话质量、效率和系统性诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前智能体应用在不同领域采用各自评估方法（如数据库查询、正则匹配），缺乏统一评估框架，且未系统考虑用户角色和专业知识，无法全面评估智能体性能。

Method: 提出TED框架：1) Talk：使用可复用的专家和非专家用户角色模板进行人机交互；2) Evaluate：将子目标（工具签名、响应）转化为自然语言评分说明，用LLM-as-a-judge自动评估，提出衡量回合效率和中间进展的新指标；3) Diagnose：引入自动错误分析工具，分析评估者和智能体间的不一致性。

Result: TED框架揭示了不同模型和用户专业知识水平下智能体性能的新见解，通过整合识别出的错误修复方案，智能体性能在提出的新指标上可提升8-10%。

Conclusion: TED框架为异构领域智能体提供了超越单纯正确性的全面评估方法，结合对话质量、效率和系统性诊断，为智能体改进提供可操作反馈。

Abstract: Agent applications are increasingly adopted to automate workflows across diverse tasks. However, due to the heterogeneous domains they operate in, it is challenging to create a scalable evaluation framework. Prior works each employ their own methods to determine task success, such as database lookups, regex match, etc., adding complexity to the development of a unified agent evaluation approach. Moreover, they do not systematically account for the user's role nor expertise in the interaction, providing incomplete insights into the agent's performance. We argue that effective agent evaluation goes beyond correctness alone, incorporating conversation quality, efficiency and systematic diagnosis of agent errors. To address this, we introduce the TED framework (Talk, Evaluate, Diagnose). (1) Talk: We leverage reusable, generic expert and non-expert user persona templates for user-agent interaction. (2) Evaluate: We adapt existing datasets by representing subgoals-such as tool signatures, and responses-as natural language grading notes, evaluated automatically with LLM-as-a-judge. We propose new metrics that capture both turn efficiency and intermediate progress of the agent complementing the user-aware setup. (3) Diagnose: We introduce an automated error analysis tool that analyzes the inconsistencies of the judge and agents, uncovering common errors, and providing actionable feedback for agent improvement. We show that our TED framework reveals new insights regarding agent performance across models and user expertise levels. We also demonstrate potential gains in agent performance with peaks of 8-10% on our proposed metrics after incorporating the identified error remedies into the agent's design.

</details>


### [584] [Understanding Reasoning in LLMs through Strategic Information Allocation under Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15500)
*Jeonghye Kim,Xufang Luo,Minbeom Kim,Sangmook Lee,Dongsheng Li,Yuqing Yang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出信息论框架，将推理分解为程序信息和认知言语化，证明认知言语化（不确定性外化）对实现信息充分性至关重要，而非特定表面标记。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLMs在推理过程中常表现出"顿悟时刻"（如出现"Wait"等标记后的自我修正），但其底层机制尚不清楚。需要理解这些表面标记背后的真正驱动因素，以改进推理模型设计。

Method: 引入信息论框架，将推理分解为程序信息（procedural information）和认知言语化（epistemic verbalization）。认知言语化指不确定性的显式外化，支持下游控制动作。通过理论分析和实证研究验证框架的有效性。

Result: 纯程序推理会陷入信息停滞，而认知言语化能持续获取信息，对实现信息充分性至关重要。实证结果显示，强大的推理性能由不确定性外化驱动，而非特定表面标记。该框架统一了先前关于顿悟时刻和训练后实验的发现。

Conclusion: 认知言语化（不确定性外化）是LLMs有效推理的关键机制，而非表面标记。该框架为未来推理模型设计提供了理论指导，强调需要促进不确定性外化的机制。

Abstract: LLMs often exhibit Aha moments during reasoning, such as apparent self-correction following tokens like "Wait," yet their underlying mechanisms remain unclear. We introduce an information-theoretic framework that decomposes reasoning into procedural information and epistemic verbalization - the explicit externalization of uncertainty that supports downstream control actions. We show that purely procedural reasoning can become informationally stagnant, whereas epistemic verbalization enables continued information acquisition and is critical for achieving information sufficiency. Empirical results demonstrate that strong reasoning performance is driven by uncertainty externalization rather than specific surface tokens. Our framework unifies prior findings on Aha moments and post-training experiments, and offers insights for future reasoning model design.

</details>


### [585] [Are Dilemmas and Conflicts in LLM Alignment Solvable? A View from Priority Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15527)
*Zhenheng Tang,Xiang Liu,Qian Wang,Eunsol Choi,Bo Li,Xiaowen Chu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出LLM冲突与困境的优先级图模型，揭示统一稳定对齐的挑战及优先级攻击漏洞，并提出运行时验证机制增强鲁棒性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM变得更强大和自主，它们在许多场景中面临越来越多的冲突和困境，需要系统性地理解和解决这些对齐挑战

Method: 1) 总结和分类LLM面临的冲突；2) 将LLM对不同选择的偏好建模为优先级图，其中指令和价值观是节点，边表示由模型输出分布决定的上下文特定优先级；3) 提出运行时验证机制，让LLM能够查询外部来源以锚定上下文并抵抗操纵

Result: 优先级图揭示了统一稳定的LLM对齐非常困难，因为图既不是静态的，在不同上下文中也不一定一致；同时揭示了优先级攻击漏洞，攻击者可以制作欺骗性上下文来操纵图并绕过安全对齐；运行时验证机制增强了鲁棒性

Conclusion: 虽然运行时验证方法提高了鲁棒性，但许多伦理和价值困境在哲学上是不可简化的，这为AI对齐的未来提出了长期、开放的挑战

Abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) become more powerful and autonomous, they increasingly face conflicts and dilemmas in many scenarios. We first summarize and taxonomize these diverse conflicts. Then, we model the LLM's preferences to make different choices as a priority graph, where instructions and values are nodes, and the edges represent context-specific priorities determined by the model's output distribution. This graph reveals that a unified stable LLM alignment is very challenging, because the graph is neither static nor necessarily consistent in different contexts. Besides, it also reveals a potential vulnerability: priority hacking, where adversaries can craft deceptive contexts to manipulate the graph and bypass safety alignments. To counter this, we propose a runtime verification mechanism, enabling LLMs to query external sources to ground their context and resist manipulation. While this approach enhances robustness, we also acknowledge that many ethical and value dilemmas are philosophically irreducible, posing a long-term, open challenge for the future of AI alignment.

</details>


### [586] [Computational Concept of the Psyche](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15586)
*Anton Kolonin,Vladimir Krykov*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种将人类心理建模为"操作系统"的认知架构概念，并基于此提出了人工通用智能的计算形式化方法，通过包含需求的状态空间中的经验学习来构建智能体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 论文旨在解决构建人工通用智能（AGI）的问题，通过借鉴人类心理模型来创建更有效的智能系统。作者认为当前AGI研究缺乏对人类心理结构的深入理解，需要建立一个将心理视为"操作系统"的框架，其中需求状态决定智能体存在的意义。

Method: 1. 提出认知架构概念：将心理视为活体或人工主体的操作系统，包含状态空间、需求状态和智能决策系统。2. 计算形式化：为创建AGI系统提出计算形式化方法，通过在包含智能体需求的状态空间中进行经验学习。3. 将AGI构建问题形式化为在特定需求空间中的最优决策系统，考虑不确定性、目标达成、风险最小化和能效最大化。4. 提供最小实验实现。

Result: 论文提出了一个完整的认知架构框架和计算形式化方法，将AGI构建问题重新定义为在需求空间中的最优决策问题。作者提供了最小实验实现，展示了该方法的可行性。

Conclusion: 通过将人类心理建模为操作系统并基于需求状态空间进行形式化，可以为人工通用智能的构建提供新的理论框架和计算方法。这种方法强调了需求在智能体决策中的核心作用，为解决AGI问题提供了系统化的途径。

Abstract: This article presents an overview of approaches to modeling the human psyche in the context of constructing an artificial one. Based on this overview, a concept of cognitive architecture is proposed, in which the psyche is viewed as the operating system of a living or artificial subject, comprising a space of states, including the state of needs that determine the meaning of a subject's being in relation to stimuli from the external world, and intelligence as a decision-making system regarding actions in this world to satisfy these needs. Based on this concept, a computational formalization is proposed for creating artificial general intelligence systems for an agent through experiential learning in a state space that includes agent's needs, taking into account their biological or existential significance for the intelligent agent, along with agent's sensations and actions. Thus, the problem of constructing artificial general intelligence is formalized as a system for making optimal decisions in the space of specific agent needs under conditions of uncertainty, maximizing success in achieving goals, minimizing existential risks, and maximizing energy efficiency. A minimal experimental implementation of the model is presented.

</details>


### [587] [OpenSeeker: Democratizing Frontier Search Agents by Fully Open-Sourcing Training Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15594)
*Yuwen Du,Rui Ye,Shuo Tang,Xinyu Zhu,Yijun Lu,Yuzhu Cai,Siheng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: OpenSeeker：首个完全开源的搜索智能体，通过事实基础的可控QA合成和去噪轨迹合成技术，仅用11.7k合成样本训练就在多个基准测试中达到前沿性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前高性能搜索智能体的开发被工业巨头垄断，缺乏透明、高质量的训练数据，这阻碍了研究社区在该领域的创新和发展。

Method: 1. 事实基础的可扩展可控QA合成：通过拓扑扩展和实体混淆反向工程网络图，生成可控覆盖和复杂度的多跳推理任务。
2. 去噪轨迹合成：采用回顾性总结机制对轨迹进行去噪，促进教师LLM生成高质量动作。

Result: OpenSeeker在BrowseComp、BrowseComp-ZH、xbench-DeepSearch和WideSearch等多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。仅用简单SFT训练，就在BrowseComp上显著优于第二好的开源智能体DeepDive（29.5% vs 15.3%），甚至在BrowseComp-ZH上超越工业竞争对手Tongyi DeepResearch（48.4% vs 46.7%）。

Conclusion: OpenSeeker通过创新的数据合成方法解决了搜索智能体训练数据稀缺的问题，实现了前沿性能，并完全开源模型权重和训练数据集，旨在促进搜索智能体研究的民主化和透明协作生态系统。

Abstract: Deep search capabilities have become an indispensable competency for frontier Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet the development of high-performance search agents remains dominated by industrial giants due to a lack of transparent, high-quality training data. This persistent data scarcity has fundamentally hindered the progress of the broader research community in developing and innovating within this domain. To bridge this gap, we introduce OpenSeeker, the first fully open-source search agent (i.e., model and data) that achieves frontier-level performance through two core technical innovations: (1) Fact-grounded scalable controllable QA synthesis, which reverse-engineers the web graph via topological expansion and entity obfuscation to generate complex, multi-hop reasoning tasks with controllable coverage and complexity. (2) Denoised trajectory synthesis, which employs a retrospective summarization mechanism to denoise the trajectory, therefore promoting the teacher LLMs to generate high-quality actions. Experimental results demonstrate that OpenSeeker, trained (a single training run) on only 11.7k synthesized samples, achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks including BrowseComp, BrowseComp-ZH, xbench-DeepSearch, and WideSearch. Notably, trained with simple SFT, OpenSeeker significantly outperforms the second-best fully open-source agent DeepDive (e.g., 29.5% v.s. 15.3% on BrowseComp), and even surpasses industrial competitors such as Tongyi DeepResearch (trained via extensive continual pre-training, SFT, and RL) on BrowseComp-ZH (48.4% v.s. 46.7%). We fully open-source the complete training dataset and the model weights to democratize frontier search agent research and foster a more transparent, collaborative ecosystem.

</details>


### [588] [Do Metrics for Counterfactual Explanations Align with User Perception?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15607)
*Felix Liedeker,Basil Ell,Philipp Cimiano,Christoph Düsing*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 当前反事实解释评估指标与人类感知质量相关性弱，数据集依赖性强，需要更以人为中心的评估方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可解释性对可信AI系统至关重要，但常用的反事实解释评估指标很少针对人类判断进行验证，不清楚这些指标是否真正反映用户感知质量

Method: 通过实证研究，在三个数据集上直接比较算法评估指标与人类判断，参与者从多个维度评估反事实解释质量，并与标准反事实指标进行关联分析

Result: 算法指标与人类评分之间的相关性普遍较弱且高度依赖数据集；增加指标数量并不能可靠改善预测效果，表明当前指标在捕捉人类相关标准方面存在结构性限制

Conclusion: 广泛使用的反事实评估指标未能反映用户感知的关键解释质量方面，强调需要更以人为中心的可解释AI评估方法

Abstract: Explainability is widely regarded as essential for trustworthy artificial intelligence systems. However, the metrics commonly used to evaluate counterfactual explanations are algorithmic evaluation metrics that are rarely validated against human judgments of explanation quality. This raises the question of whether such metrics meaningfully reflect user perceptions. We address this question through an empirical study that directly compares algorithmic evaluation metrics with human judgments across three datasets. Participants rated counterfactual explanations along multiple dimensions of perceived quality, which we relate to a comprehensive set of standard counterfactual metrics. We analyze both individual relationships and the extent to which combinations of metrics can predict human assessments. Our results show that correlations between algorithmic metrics and human ratings are generally weak and strongly dataset-dependent. Moreover, increasing the number of metrics used in predictive models does not lead to reliable improvements, indicating structural limitations in how current metrics capture criteria relevant for humans. Overall, our findings suggest that widely used counterfactual evaluation metrics fail to reflect key aspects of explanation quality as perceived by users, underscoring the need for more human-centered approaches to evaluating explainable artificial intelligence.

</details>


<div id='cs.DB'></div>

# cs.DB [[Back]](#toc)

### [589] [Querying Everything Everywhere All at Once: Supervaluationism for the Agentic Lakehouse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13380)
*Jacopo Tagliabue*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种支持多分支查询的代理分析系统，能够在数据分支上评估查询，而非单一数据快照。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着代理分析的发展，数据湖屋变成了多版本系统：生产者（人类或AI）在数据分支中实现竞争性管道，而消费者（人类或AI）需要在不了解底层数据生命周期的情况下获得答案。现有主流OLAP系统缺乏可比的多分支查询能力。

Method: 开发了一个原型系统，专注于新颖的查询路径，使用超赋值语义评估跨分支的查询。系统开源了演示代码作为OLAP社区的具体基准。

Result: 展示了能够跨分支而非单一快照回答查询的新系统，为多分支查询提供了具体实现方案。

Conclusion: 代理分析需要多分支查询能力，论文提出的系统和开源代码为OLAP社区提供了多分支查询的基准解决方案。

Abstract: Agentic analytics is turning the lakehouse into a multi-version system: swarms of (human or AI) producers materialize competing pipelines in data branches, while (human or AI) consumers need answers without knowing the underlying data life-cycle. We demonstrate a new system that answers questions across branches rather than at a single snapshot. Our prototype focuses on a novel query path that evaluates queries under supervaluationary semantics. In the absence of comparable multi-branch querying capabilities in mainstream OLAP systems, we open source the demo code as a concrete baseline for the OLAP community.

</details>


### [590] [MCI-SQL: Text-to-SQL with Metadata-Complete Context and Intermediate Correction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13390)
*Qin Wang,Youhuan Li,Suixi Lin,Zhuo Tang,Kenli Li,Peng Peng,Quanqing Xu,Chuanhui Yang*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: MCI-SQL框架通过元数据完整上下文和改进的中间修正机制，显著提升Text-to-SQL任务的准确率，在BIRD基准上达到SOTA性能，并发布了修正版数据集BIRD-clear。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL方法存在两个主要问题：1) 在模式链接阶段难以理解原始元数据，导致列过滤困难；2) 候选SQL生成过程中存在推理错误，限制了准确率提升。

Method: 提出MCI-SQL框架：1) 为每列分配元数据完整上下文，提升模式链接的列过滤准确性；2) 引入中间修正机制，及时验证和修正SQL查询错误；3) 在后续SQL对齐和选择阶段进行优化。

Result: 在BIRD基准测试中，开发集执行准确率达74.45%，测试集达76.41%，超越当前已发表的SOTA结果。在修正版BIRD-clear数据集上，比基线方法高出8.47个百分点。

Conclusion: MCI-SQL框架通过元数据完整上下文和中间修正机制，有效解决了现有Text-to-SQL方法的局限性，显著提升了SQL生成的准确性和可靠性，并贡献了改进的数据集。

Abstract: Text-to-SQL aims to translate natural language queries into SQL statements. Existing methods typically follow a pipeline of pre-processing, schema linking, candidate SQL generation, SQL alignment, and target SQL selection. However, these methods face significant challenges. First, they often struggle with column filtering during schema linking due to difficulties in comprehending raw metadata. Also, the candidate SQL generation process often suffers from reasoning errors, which limits accuracy improvements. To address these limitations, we propose a framework, called MCI-SQL, to efficiently and precisely generate SQL queries. Specifically, we assign metadata-complete contexts to each column, which significantly improves the accuracy of column filtering for schema linking. Also, for candidate SQL generation, we propose an intermediate correction mechanism that validates SQL queries and revises errors in a timely way. Moreover, we also propose effective optimizations in subsequent SQL alignment and selection phases, which further enhance the performance. Experiments on the widely-used BIRD benchmark show that MCI-SQL achieves execution accuracy of 74.45% on the development set and 76.41% on the test set, surpassing current published state-of-the-art results. In addition, we manually identify and correct 412 samples in the BIRD dataset, forming a new version named BIRD-clear, which is released together with our code on GitHub. We also evaluate our methods on BIRD-clear and find that MCI-SQL outperforms baselines by 8.47 percentage points in execution accuracy, further demonstrating the effectiveness and reliability of our framework.

</details>


### [591] [d-HNSW: A High-performance Vector Search Engine on Disaggregated Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13591)
*Fei Fang,Yi Liu,Chen Qian*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: d-HNSW：首个针对解耦内存系统优化的RDMA向量搜索引擎，通过硬件-算法协同设计解决图索引在解耦架构中的挑战，实现低延迟高吞吐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着解耦架构将计算和内存资源分离以提升利用率，传统向量数据库的图索引在这种架构下面临网络效率低下、内存布局不连续、数据传输冗余和资源利用率不足等新挑战。

Method: 采用硬件-算法协同设计技术：1) 平衡聚类与轻量级代表索引减少网络往返；2) RDMA友好的图布局保持动态插入的数据连续性；3) 查询感知数据加载消除批量查询冗余获取；4) 流水线执行模型重叠RDMA传输与计算。

Result: 在公有云评估中，d-HNSW相比基线实现高达<10-2倍查询延迟和>100倍查询吞吐，同时保持94%的高召回率。

Conclusion: d-HNSW成功解决了向量搜索在解耦内存系统中的关键挑战，在保持HNSW高精度的同时显著提升了性能和资源利用率，为大规模AI应用提供了高效的向量搜索解决方案。

Abstract: Efficient vector search is essential for powering large-scale AI applications, such as LLMs. Existing solutions are designed for monolithic architectures where compute and memory are tightly coupled. Recently, disaggregated architecture breaks this coupling by separating compution and memory resources into independently scalable pools to improve utilization. However, applying vector database on disaggregated memory system brings unique challenges to system design due to its graph-based index. We present d-HNSW, the first RDMA-based vector search engine optimized for disaggregated memory systems. d-HNSW preserves HNSW's high accuracy while addressing the new system-level challenges introduced by disaggregation: 1) network inefficiency from pointer-chasing traversals, 2) non-contiguous remote memory layout induced by dynamic insertions, 3) redundant data transfers in batch workloads, and 4) resource underutilization due to sequential execution. d-HNSW tackles these challenges through a set of hardware-algorithm co-designed techniques, including 1) balanced clustering with a lightweight representative index to reduce network round-trips and ensure predictable latency, 2) an RDMA-friendly graph layout that preserves data contiguity under dynamic insertions, 3) query-aware data loading to eliminate redundant fetches across batch queries, and 4) a pipelined execution model that overlaps RDMA transfers with computation to hide network latency and improve throughput. Our evaluation results in a public cloud show that d-HNSW achieves up to < 10-2x query latency and > 100x query throughput compared to other baselines, while maintaining a high recall of 94%.

</details>


### [592] [The Equivalence Theorem: First-Class Relationships for Structurally Complete Database Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13603)
*Matthew Alford*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 本文证明了结构完备的知识表示需要四个相互蕴含的能力：带属性的n元关系、时间有效性、不确定性量化和关系间的因果关系，这等价于将关系视为一等对象。任何实现其中一种能力的系统都需要全部四种，缺少任何一种都无法达到结构完备性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决知识表示中的结构完备性问题，为AI系统提供完整的知识表示框架，同时解决经典AI问题如框架问题、冲突解决和常识推理。

Method: 提出等价定理的证明，展示一个满足所有四个条件的Attributed Temporal Causal Hypergraph (ATCH)框架，建立严格的表达能力层次结构，并分析计算复杂度边界。

Result: 证明了结构完备性需要四个相互蕴含的能力，建立了SQL < LPG < TypeDB < ATCH的表达能力层次，展示了NP完全性的一般查询但在实际查询类别中多项式时间可解，并推导出经典AI问题的解决方案。

Conclusion: 结构完备的知识表示需要四个相互蕴含的能力，ATCH框架实现了这些能力，提供了严格的表达能力层次和可行的计算复杂度，能够解决多个经典AI问题，并通过PostgreSQL扩展验证了实际可行性。

Abstract: We prove The Equivalence Theorem: structurally complete knowledge representation requires exactly four mutually entailing capabilities -- n-ary relationships with attributes, temporal validity, uncertainty quantification, and causal relationships between relationships -- collectively equivalent to treating relationships as first-class objects. Any system implementing one capability necessarily requires all four; any system missing one cannot achieve structural completeness. This result is constructive: we exhibit an Attributed Temporal Causal Hypergraph (ATCH) framework satisfying all four conditions simultaneously. The theorem yields a strict expressiveness hierarchy -- SQL < LPG < TypeDB < ATCH -- with witness queries that are structurally inexpressible at each lower level. We establish computational complexity bounds showing NP-completeness for general queries but polynomial-time tractability for practical query classes (acyclic patterns, bounded-depth causal chains, windowed temporal queries). As direct corollaries, we derive solutions to classical AI problems: the Frame Problem (persistence by default from temporal validity), conflict resolution (contradictions as unresolved metadata with hidden variable discovery), and common sense reasoning (defaults with causal inhibitors). A prototype PostgreSQL extension in C validates practical feasibility within the established complexity bounds.

</details>


### [593] [Jaguar: A Primal Algorithm for Conjunctive Query Evaluation in Submodular-Width Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13624)
*Mahmoud Abo Khamis,Hubie Chen*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出名为Jaguar的新算法，用于合取查询评估，可在O(N^{subw(Q)+ε})时间内运行，比现有PANDA算法更简单，在原始空间操作并自适应计算连接。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有PANDA算法虽然能在O(N^{subw(Q)}·polylog(N))时间内评估合取查询，但其描述和分析复杂。需要更简单、更直观的算法，同时保持相似的性能保证。

Method: 提出Jaguar算法，在原始空间操作，维护可行的原始解（多拟阵）。算法直接处理输入合取查询，以引导方式自适应计算一系列连接操作，确保连接计算成本有界。

Result: 对于每个布尔合取查询Q和任意ε>0，Jaguar算法能在O(N^{subw(Q)+ε})时间内运行。该算法还能处理包含度约束的子模宽度泛化。

Conclusion: Jaguar算法提供了一种比PANDA更简单、更直观的合取查询评估方法，在原始空间操作，通过自适应引导连接计算实现接近最优的运行时间。

Abstract: The submodular width is a complexity measure of conjunctive queries (CQs), which assigns a nonnegative real number, subw(Q), to each CQ Q. An existing algorithm, called PAND, performs CQ evaluation in polynomial time where the exponent is essentially subw(Q). Formally, for every Boolean CQ Q, PANDA evaluates Q in time $O(N^{\mathsf{subw}(Q)} \cdot \mathsf{polylog}(N))$, where N denotes the input size; moreover, there is complexity-theoretic evidence that, for a number of Boolean CQs, no exponent strictly below subw(Q) can be achieved by combinatorial algorithms. On a high level, the submodular width of a CQ Q can be described as the maximum over all polymatroids, which are set functions on the variables of Q that satisfy Shannon inequalities. The PANDA algorithm in a sense works in the dual space of this maximization problem, makes use of information theory, and transforms a CQ into a set of disjunctive datalog programs which are individually solved.
  In this article, we introduce a new algorithm for CQ evaluation which achieves, for each Boolean CQ Q and for all epsilon > 0, a running time of $O(N^{\mathsf{subw}(Q)+ε})$. This new algorithm's description and analysis are, in our view, significantly simpler than those of PANDA. We refer to it as a "primal" algorithm as it operates in the primal space of the described maximization problem, by maintaining a feasible primal solution, namely, a polymatroid. Indeed, this algorithm deals directly with the input CQ and adaptively computes a sequence of joins, in a guided fashion, so that the cost of these join computations is bounded. Additionally, this algorithm can achieve the stated runtime for the generalization of the submodular width incorporating degree constraints. We dub our algorithm Jaguar, as it is a join-adaptive guided algorithm.

</details>


### [594] [AgenticScholar: Agentic Data Management with Pipeline Orchestration for Scholarly Corpora](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13774)
*Hai Lan,Tingting Wang,Zhifeng Bao,Guoliang Li,Daomin Ji,Ge Lee,Feng Luo,Zi Huang,Hailang Qiu,Gang Hua*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: AgenticScholar：一个集成结构化知识表示、混合查询规划和统一执行的智能学术数据管理系统，显著优于现有系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 快速增长的学术文献库在表示、推理和高效分析方面面临重大挑战，现有RAG和文档分析系统无法同时支持检索、知识发现和生成等多种查询类型

Method: 提出AgenticScholar系统，包含：1）结构感知知识表示层；2）LLM驱动的混合查询规划层；3）具有可组合算子的统一执行层，能够将自然语言查询自动转换为可执行的DAG计划

Result: 广泛实验表明，AgenticScholar在有效性、效率和可解释性方面显著优于现有系统

Conclusion: AgenticScholar为未来的智能学术数据管理研究提供了实用基础，能够统一支持多样化的学术查询需求

Abstract: Managing the rapidly growing scholarly corpus poses significant challenges in representation, reasoning, and efficient analysis. An ideal system should unify structured knowledge management, agentic planning, and interpretable execution to support diverse scholarly queries - from retrieval to knowledge discovery and generation - at scale. Unfortunately, existing RAG and document analytics systems fail to achieve all query types simultaneously. To this end, we propose AgenticScholar, an agentic scholarly data management system that integrates a structure-aware knowledge representation layer, an LLM-centric hybrid query planning layer, and a unified execution layer with composable operators. AgenticScholar autonomously translates natural language queries into executable DAG plans, enabling end-to-end reasoning over multi-modal scholarly data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AgenticScholar significantly outperforms existing systems in effectiveness, efficiency, and interpretability, offering a practical foundation for future research on agentic scholarly data management.

</details>


### [595] [MICRO: A Lightweight Middleware for Optimizing Cross-store Cross-model Graph-Relation Joins [Technical Report]](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13835)
*Xiuwen Zheng,Arun Kumar,Amarnath Gupta*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出MICRO中间件，通过CMLero学习排序优化器实现图存储与关系存储的跨模型连接查询，避免数据转换，性能优于现有联邦系统


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代数据应用涉及异构数据模型和分散的数据库引擎，但现有研究对联邦环境下的跨模型查询处理关注有限，且数据转换或物化通常不可行

Method: 1) 形式化定义图存储与关系存储的跨模型连接查询类，提出统一代数；2) 创建1个真实基准和4个半合成基准；3) 开发轻量级中间件MICRO，其核心是CMLero学习排序查询优化器，无需精确成本估计即可选择高效执行计划

Result: MICRO在完整测试集上比最先进的联邦关系系统XDB快达2.1倍；在真实基准的93个查询中，14个查询加速超过100倍（其中4个超过100倍），但4个查询出现超过5秒的减速；CMLero始终优于基于规则和回归的优化器

Conclusion: MICRO实现了异构系统间的原生跨模型查询，避免了数据转换需求；学习排序方法在复杂跨模型优化中具有优势，但部分查询的减速表明仍有改进空间

Abstract: Modern data applications increasingly involve heterogeneous data managed in different models and stored across disparate database engines, often deployed as separate installs. Limited research has addressed cross-model query processing in federated environments. This paper takes a step toward bridging this gap by: (1) formally defining a class of cross-model join queries between a graph store and a relational store by proposing a unified algebra; (2) introducing one real-world benchmark and four semi-synthetic benchmarks to evaluate such queries; and (3) proposing a lightweight middleware, MICRO, for efficient query execution. At the core of MICRO is CMLero, a learning-to-rank-based query optimizer that selects efficient execution plans without requiring exact cost estimation. By avoiding the need to materialize or convert all data into a single model, which is often infeasible due to third-party data control or cost, MICRO enables native querying across heterogeneous systems. Experimental results on the benchmark workloads demonstrate that MICRO outperforms the state-of-the-art federated relational system XDB by up to 2.1x in total runtime across the full test set. On the 93 test queries of real-world benchmark, 14 queries achieve over 100 speedup, including 4 queries with more than 100x speedup; however, 4 queries experienced slowdowns of over 5 seconds, highlighting opportunities for future improvement of MICRO. Further comparisons show that CMLero consistently outperforms rule-based and regression-based optimizers, highlighting the advantage of learning-to-rank in complex cross-model optimization.

</details>


### [596] [Concurrency Control as a Service](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13897)
*Weixing Zhou,Yanfeng Zhang,Xinji Zhou,Zhiyou Wang,Zeshun Peng,Yang Ren,Sihao Li,Huanchen Zhang,Guoliang Li,Ge Yu*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: CCaaS将并发控制从数据库中解耦，构建执行-CC-存储三层解耦数据库，通过SM-OCC算法和异步日志下推机制减少网络通信开销，实现独立扩展和高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解耦数据库将执行和存储层分离，但并发控制成为关键瓶颈，限制了资源扩展和性能提升。将CC与执行或存储层耦合限制了弹性扩展和资源利用率。

Method: 提出CCaaS架构，将并发控制作为独立服务层。设计SM-OCC算法（分片多写OCC）和异步日志下推机制减少网络通信。采用多写架构和确定性冲突解决方法来降低协调开销。

Result: CCaaS相比现有最先进解耦数据库，吞吐量提高1.02-3.11倍，延迟降低1.11-2.75倍，实现了更高的弹性、可扩展性和性能。

Conclusion: CCaaS通过将并发控制解耦为独立服务层，构建三层解耦数据库架构，显著提升了数据库的弹性、资源利用率和开发敏捷性，同时保持高性能。

Abstract: Existing disaggregated databases separate execution and storage layers, enabling independent and elastic scaling of resources. In most cases, this design makes transaction concurrency control (CC) a critical bottleneck, which demands significant computing resources for concurrent conflict management and struggles to scale due to the coordination overhead for concurrent conflict resolution. Coupling CC with execution or storage limits performance and elasticity, as CC's resource needs do not align with the free scaling of the transaction execution layer or the storage-bound data layer. This paper proposes Concurrency Control as a Service (CCaaS), which decouples CC from databases, building an execution-CC-storage three-layer decoupled database, allowing independent scaling and upgrades for improved elasticity, resource utilization, and development agility. However, adding a new layer increases latency due to the shift in communication from hardware to network. To address this, we propose a Sharded Multi-Write OCC (SM-OCC) algorithm with an asynchronous log push-down mechanism to minimize network communications overhead and transaction latency. Additionally, we implement a multi-write architecture with a deterministic conflict resolution method to reduce coordination overhead in the CC layer, thereby improving scalability. CCaaS is designed to be connected by a variety of execution and storage engines. Existing disaggregated databases can be revolutionized with CCaaS to achieve high elasticity, scalability, and high performance. Results show that CCaaS achieves 1.02-3.11X higher throughput and 1.11-2.75X lower latency than SoTA disaggregated databases.

</details>


### [597] [ATCC: Adaptive Concurrency Control for Unforeseen Agentic Transactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13906)
*Weixing Zhou,Zhiyou Wang,Zeshun Peng,Hetian Chen,Yanfeng Zhang,Ge Yu*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: ATCC提出了一种面向数据代理事务的自适应并发控制机制，通过监控事务行为、动态选择乐观/悲观执行策略，并结合强化学习和成本感知的锁调度，显著提升了代理事务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据代理（由大语言模型驱动）产生的新型事务具有长时间执行、不规则执行间隔和非确定性访问模式等特点，打破了传统并发控制机制的假设（如短时、预定义）。传统固定策略的并发控制方案无法适应这种动态行为，导致性能不足。

Method: ATCC通过持续监控和解释每个代理事务的运行时行为，评估其交互阶段，动态为每个事务选择乐观或悲观执行策略。采用基于强化学习的策略来平衡即时阻塞与未来中止成本，确保自适应切换的精确时机。同时集成成本感知的基于优先级的锁调度，优先处理成本高或延迟敏感的事务。

Result: 在类似代理的YCSB和TPC-C工作负载下的实验结果表明，ATCC将代理事务的吞吐量提升了高达4个数量级，并将尾部延迟降低了高达90%，相比最先进的并发控制方案。

Conclusion: ATCC成功解决了数据代理事务带来的新挑战，通过自适应并发控制机制显著提升了系统性能，为支持LLM驱动的数据代理提供了有效的并发控制解决方案。

Abstract: Data agents, empowered by Large Language Models (LLMs), introduce a new paradigm in transaction processing. Unlike traditional applications with fixed patterns, data agents run online-generated workflows that repeatedly issue SQL statements, reason over intermediate results, and revise subsequent plans. To ensure data consistency, these SQL statements issued by an agent should be integrated into a transaction, referred to as agentic transactions. Agentic transactions exhibit unforeseen characteristics, including long execution times, irregular execution intervals, and non-deterministic access patterns, breaking the assumptions underlying concurrency control (CC) (e.g., short-lived, predefined). Traditional CC schemes, which rely on fixed policies, fail to capture such dynamic behavior, resulting in inadequate performance. This paper introduces ATCC, an adaptive Concurrency Control for Agentic Transactions. ATCC continuously monitors and interprets the runtime behavior of each agentic transaction, evaluates its interactive phases, and dynamically adapts optimistic or pessimistic execution for each transaction. To ensure precise timing for adaptive switches, ATCC employs a reinforcement learning-based policy to balance immediate blocking against future abort costs. Additionally, to mitigate contention-induced tail latency and wasted reasoning cost caused by abort, a cost-aware priority-based lock scheduling is integrated to prioritize expensive or latency-sensitive transactions. Experimental results under agentic-like YCSB and TPC-C workloads demonstrate that ATCC improves the throughput of agentic transactions by up to four orders of magnitude and reduces tail latency by up to 90% compared to state-of-the-art CC schemes.

</details>


### [598] [Wheel Dynamic Load Estimation Method Based on Gas Pressure of Hydro-pneumatic Suspension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14242)
*Qijun Liao,Jue Yang,Subhash Rakheja,Yiting Kang,Yumeng Yao,Yuming Yin*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出基于油气悬架气压的轮毂动态载荷估计新方法，仅需单个压力传感器，无需传统轮胎模型或多传感器融合


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统轮毂动态载荷估计方法依赖轮胎模型和多传感器融合，硬件冗余且误差传播复杂，需要更简单实用的解决方案

Method: 建立悬架腔压力与轮胎-地面接触力的非线性耦合模型，考虑悬架非线性刚度特性，开发迭代算法仅用单个压力传感器数据估计轮毂动态载荷

Result: 实验验证显示测量与估计数据吻合良好，TruckSim联合仿真验证了阻尼力和轮毂动态载荷计算的准确性，模型能有效表征油气悬架系统机械行为

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种实用、低成本、高效的解决方案，硬件依赖性最小，减少了硬件冗余和测量误差传播

Abstract: This paper proposes a novel method to estimate the wheel dynamic load based on the gas pressure of a hydro-pneumatic suspension. A nonlinear coupled model between suspension chamber pressure and tire-ground contact force is developed, integrating suspension dynamics with its nonlinear stiffness characteristics. An iterative algorithm is developed to estimate wheel dynamic load using data from only one single pressure sensor, thereby eliminating the reliance on traditional tire models and complex multi-sensor fusion frameworks. This method effectively reduces hardware redundancy and minimizes the propagation of measurement errors. The proposed model is experimentally validated on a dedicated suspension test bench, demonstrating satisfactory agreement between the measured and estimated data. Additionally, co-simulation with TruckSim verifies the accuracy of both the calculated damping force and wheel dynamic load, demonstrating the effectiveness of the model on characterizing the mechanical behavior of the hydro-pneumatic suspension system. The proposed method provides a practical, low-cost, and efficient solution with minimal hardware dependencies.

</details>


### [599] [Causal Search for Skylines (CSS): Causally-Informed Selective Data De-Correlation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14339)
*Pratanu Mandal,Abhinav Gorantla,K. Selçuk Candan,Maria Luisa Sapino*

Main category: cs.DB

TL;DR: 提出因果感知的选择性去相关机制CSS，通过消除与偏好标准不一致的属性相关性来提升天际线查询效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 天际线查询效率严重依赖底层数据统计特性，现有算法难以有效利用数据分布中的对齐信息，同时会受到不对齐分布的负面影响

Method: 基于因果图识别可用于选择性去相关的属性子集，提出因果搜索天际线(CSS)方法，该方法与底层候选枚举和剪枝策略无关

Result: 在多个真实和合成数据集上，针对不同天际线发现算法，CSS显著减少了支配检查次数和定位天际线点的总体时间

Conclusion: 因果感知的选择性去相关技术能有效提升天际线算法性能，通过保留与用户偏好一致的相关性同时消除不一致的相关性来优化算法效率
